name: CustomGPT.ai
tagline: Manage and query retrieval-augmented AI agents
description: List CustomGPT agents, create conversations, and query an agent grounded in its configured knowledge sources. The API calls agents projects in endpoint paths for backward compatibility.

auth.hint: Create an API key under My Profile → API and send it as Authorization: Bearer <API_KEY>.

tools.name: list_agents
tools.description: List CustomGPT agents, represented as projects in the API, using the API's paginated project collection.

tools.name: create_conversation
tools.description: Create a named conversation for an agent and return the session identifier used for later messages.

tools.name: send_agent_message
tools.description: Send a prompt in an existing agent conversation and return the grounded assistant answer and related response data.

params.name: prompt
params.description: Question or instruction to send to the agent.
